title: Waterproof Durable Backpack Cover Blue Universal Fit Adjustable Draw String
description:
Be prepared and protect your investment inside your backpack in any kind of weather. The durable waterproof polyester backpack cover fits most standard size backpacks and protects the backpack and contents inside from rain and snow. Versatile straps and draw string closure allow for the cover to fit backpacks snugly and securely, even in a torrential downpour. Bright blue cover makes it easy to spot, and also folds for easy storage and transportation. This Backpack Cover is ideal for taking along hikes, camping, fishing, boating, and everyday use. Whether its your laptop in your backpack or camping supplies, this backpack cover has your back!
